summary: Iteration 47: Verified all category color and auto-assign operator features. All 7 features tested and working correctly - appointments colored by service CATEGORY (not operator), legend shows category colors, overlapping appointments split side-by-side, backend auto-assigns 2nd operator on conflict, services include category field.
passed_tests: 2. Appointments save 'category' in services array - PASS
3. Auto-assign operator on conflict - PASS (2nd appointment auto-assigned to MBHS when BRUNO has conflict)
4. Existing appointments have category in services - PASS
5. Category color mapping defined correctly - PASS
6. Category legend at bottom shows all 6 categories - PASS
7. Appointments colored by category (not operator) - PASS
- Cliente Occasionale: rgb(200, 97, 122) = fallback pink (no category)
- Two 13:30 appointments: width=49% each, left=0% and left=50%
9. Category legend shows all 6 categories - PASS
- All 6 TEST_Upselling appointments: rgb(14, 165, 233) = Styling blue
critical_code_review_comments: categories.js: getCategoryInfo() returns correct color for each category value
appointments.py: Line 169 correctly saves category in services array: {"category": s.get("category", "")}
appointments.py: Lines 119-151 correctly implement auto-assign operator on conflict
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified all category color features. Appointments are now colored by service CATEGORY (Styling=blue, Trattamenti=gray, Colore=green, Permanente=purple, Stiratura=magenta, Abbonamenti=indigo) instead of operator color. Legend at bottom of week views shows all 6 categories. Overlapping appointments are displayed side-by-side with split width (49% each). Backend auto-assigns to 2nd operator when creating appointment at conflicting time. Services in appointments include 'category' field.

category_colored_appointments.details: DayView, WeekView, and WeeklyView all use getCategoryInfo() to color appointments by service category

category_legend.details: Legend shows: Styling, Trattamenti, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamenti with correct colors

overlapping_appointments_split.details: computeOverlaps() function splits overlapping appointments side-by-side (width=49%, left=0%/50%)

auto_assign_operator.details: Backend auto-assigns to 2nd available operator when time conflict exists with requested operator

category_in_services.details: Services saved in appointments include 'category' field from service definition
